image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: The Sun fuses hydrogen into helium, releasing energy that becomes sunlight.
Context visual: But how does this fusion actually occur? It all starts deep within its core.
Escalation visual: Intense pressure and temperature force hydrogen atoms to collide, overcoming repulsion.
Evidence visual: This collision creates helium and releases enormous energy in the form of light and heat.
Payoff visual: This energy travels 93 million miles to reach us, illuminating our days.
Cta visual: Curious about more cosmic wonders? Like and follow for more stellar insights!
